/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native "CMakeFiles/sproute-cpu.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sproute-cpu.dir/dist.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sproute-cpu.dir/dl.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sproute-cpu.dir/err.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sproute-cpu.dir/heap.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sproute-cpu.dir/mst2.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sproute-cpu.dir/neighbors.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sproute-cpu.dir/bookshelf_IO.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sproute-cpu.dir/memAlloc.c.o" -o sproute-cpu  ../../../../libgalois/libgalois_shmem.a ../../../liblonestar/liblonestar.a ../../../../libgalois/libgalois_shmem.a /usr/lib64/libnuma.so /work/08474/ywwu/ls6/source/llvm-project/build/lib/libLLVMSupport.a -lrt -ldl -lpthread -lm /usr/lib64/libz.so /usr/lib64/libzstd.so /usr/lib64/libtinfo.so /work/08474/ywwu/ls6/source/llvm-project/build/lib/libLLVMDemangle.a
